MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-01-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Collins, Esq. 858-866-1400 of PRA specially appearing for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S Motion To Vacate Judgment.

Grant. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
